summary: Iteration 30 Testing - UI Renaming and Tab Navigation. All 11 features tested and verified. Sidebar correctly shows 'Employee Management' and 'Operator Management' (renamed). Pod Management and Access Scopes moved as sub-pages under Employee Management with 3-tab navigation. Backwards compatibility for old routes (/admin/pods, /admin/employee-scopes) maintained.

issues: Mixed content warning: Notifications API called with HTTP instead of HTTPS - causes failed fetch

sidebar_renaming.employee_management_label: PASS - 'Employee Management' shown in Admin Config submenu (was 'Employees')
sidebar_renaming.operator_management_label: PASS - 'Operator Management' shown in Admin Config submenu (was 'Operators')
sidebar_renaming.pod_management_not_in_sidebar: PASS - 'Pod Management' NOT shown as separate sidebar item (now sub-page)
sidebar_renaming.access_scopes_not_in_sidebar: PASS - 'Access Scopes' NOT shown as separate sidebar item (now sub-page)
sidebar_renaming.geography_still_in_sidebar: PASS - 'Geography' still appears as separate item in Admin Config

employee_management_page.three_tabs_exist: PASS - 3 tabs found: Employees, Pod Management, Access Scopes
employee_management_page.tab_testids: PASS - All tabs have correct data-testid attributes (tab-employees, tab-pod-management, tab-access-scopes)

tab_navigation.pod_management_tab_click: PASS - Clicking 'Pod Management' tab navigates to /admin/employees/pods
tab_navigation.access_scopes_tab_click: PASS - Clicking 'Access Scopes' tab navigates to /admin/employees/access-scopes
tab_navigation.employees_tab_click: PASS - Clicking 'Employees' tab navigates back to /admin/employees
tab_navigation.pod_management_tab_highlight: PASS - Pod Management tab is highlighted when on /admin/employees/pods
tab_navigation.access_scopes_tab_highlight: PASS - Access Scopes tab is highlighted when on /admin/employees/access-scopes

sub_pages_with_tabs.pod_management_page: PASS - /admin/employees/pods loads PodManagement with 3 tabs and 'Pod Management' h2 title
sub_pages_with_tabs.access_scopes_page: PASS - /admin/employees/access-scopes loads EmployeeScopeManagement with 3 tabs and 'Access Scopes' h2 title

backwards_compatibility.admin_pods_route: PASS - /admin/pods route works and loads PodManagement with tabs
backwards_compatibility.admin_employee_scopes_route: PASS - /admin/employee-scopes route works and loads EmployeeScopeManagement with tabs

action_items: MINOR: Fix mixed content warning - notifications API endpoint uses HTTP instead of HTTPS
critical_code_review_comments: useSidebarMenu.js correctly renamed 'Employees' to 'Employee Management' at line 177
useSidebarMenu.js correctly renamed 'Operators' to 'Operator Management' at line 176
Pod Management and Access Scopes removed from sidebar submenu (lines 192-195 now only show Geography)
All three sub-pages (EmployeesManagement, PodManagement, EmployeeScopeManagement) have consistent tab navigation with data-testid attributes
Routes in App.jsx correctly configured: old routes (/admin/pods, /admin/employee-scopes) and new routes (/admin/employees/pods, /admin/employees/access-scopes) both work
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI renaming and restructuring complete. Employee Management page now has 3 sub-pages accessible via tabs: Employees, Pod Management, Access Scopes. Old routes (/admin/pods, /admin/employee-scopes) are backwards compatible. Sidebar Admin Config shows: Dashboard for Admins, User Management, Operator Management, Employee Management, Commission, Bills, Audit Logs, Permissions, Database, Validation, Geography.
